audience: user asking how to install ShardLoom today
blocked_explanation: Public channels need trusted publishing, provenance, clean install proof, security gates, release approval, and publication-specific evidence.
claim_boundary: Local dry-run proof and channel readiness only; no PyPI, Homebrew, conda-forge, GHCR, crates.io, production, or package-publication claim.
expected_output_evidence: target/release-dry-run-proof/transcript.json records local source artifacts and no-publication status.
title: Package, release, and install channel boundary
